title: jules: record archivist learning on index generation 🗃️
summary: Attempted to update the generated index rollups, but the PR was superseded by #1747. Aborted the patch and recorded the workflow collision as a friction item.
proof_summary: Recorded a learning PR outlining how concurrent index updates can lead to stale draft PRs being superseded by maintainers.
follow_ups: Investigate deferring index generation to merge-queue
